note: Pins the exact mock requests/responses the protected tests exercise. Shapes and status codes come from the official docs; concrete handles and fixture values are deterministic mock pins.

query.requestId: UUID from the injected factory; ONE per ExecuteAsync call, shared by every retry of that call
query.retry: present and true on every resubmission of the same requestId; absent on first attempts

submit.omitted_fields_rule: unset optional fields must be absent from the JSON body, not null

retry_policy.retry_after_header: Retry-After (seconds); when present it overrides the fallback backoff
retry_policy.dedupe_rule: retries reuse the SAME requestId with retry=true so the server can answer from the original execution instead of running the statement twice

polling.trigger: a 202 QueryStatus on a nominally synchronous submission
polling.path: exactly the statementStatusUrl returned by the server
polling.rule: poll the status URL; NEVER resubmit the POST to chase a 202

malformed_400.client_rule: surface immediately; retrying a malformed request can never succeed

responses.token_rule: the bearer token must never appear in exception text
